ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Title of the assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the assignment belongs to */,
  "display_priority" INTEGER /* Priority for display order of the assignment */,
  "assignment_type" TEXT /* Type of the assignment (e.g., peer review) */,
  "password_message" TEXT /* Message related to password protection for the assignment */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for accessing the assignment (if applicable) */,
  "visible_to_students" INTEGER /* Indicator if the assignment is visible to students */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Deadline for the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the assignment was last updated */,
  "notification_sent" INTEGER /* Indicator if a notification has been sent for the assignment */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for the assignment */,
  "files" TEXT /* JSON array of file URLs associated with the assignment */,
  "max_attempts" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attempts allowed for the assignment */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who created the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_assignment_type FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_type") REFERENCES assignment_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Course code (e.g., CS101) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary instructor for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* JSON array of the instructor's office hours */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the instructor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrolled student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course in which the student is enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (e.g., Active, Dropped) */,
  "final_grade" REAL /* Final grade of the student in the course */,
  "instructor_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the instructor regarding the student's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major field of study of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "admission_year" INTEGER /* Year the student was admitted to the university */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Current GPA of the student */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's academic advisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission record */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment being submitted */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student submitting the assignment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was submitted */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade received for the assignment */,
  "attempt_number" INTEGER /* Number of the attempt for the submission */,
  "file_urls" TEXT /* JSON array of file URLs submitted */,
  "late_submission" INTEGER /* Indicator if the submission was late */,
  "instructor_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the instructor regarding the submission */,
  "resubmission_allowed" INTEGER /* Indicator if resubmission is allowed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignment_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission the feedback is related to */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text containing the feedback provided */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  "score" REAL /* Numerical score given by the instructor */,
  "rubric" TEXT /* JSON array of the rubric used for grading */,
  "resubmission_required" INTEGER /* Indicator if a resubmission is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_feedback_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_feedback_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what this assignment type entails */,
  "max_group_size" INTEGER /* Maximum size of the group for group assignments */,
  "min_group_size" INTEGER /* Minimum size of the group for group assignments */,
  "peer_review_required" INTEGER /* Indicator if peer review is required */,
  "grading_scale" TEXT /* Grading scale used for the assignment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
